title: Individual Development Accounts * Native American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Individual Development Accounts * Native American Community 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER MICRO ENTERPRISE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides technical assistance, training in business skills, assistance writing business plans, access to financial business counseling, individual development accounts (IDAs), and other support for individuals who want to establish a small business. 5135 NE Columbia Boulevard Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Individuals who self-identify as tribal members Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 288-8177 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WARM SPRINGS COMMUNITY ACTION TEAM INDIVIDUAL DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Individual Development Accounts (IDAs), a matched savings program that helps community members save money and receive matching funds. Participants attend financial and asset-specific education classes. Funds can be used for home ownership, home repairs, starting a business, education, rent, vehicles, paying off debt, or assistive technology. 1136 Paiute Avenue Warm Springs, OR 97761 Eligibility: People who live, work, or have addresses on the Warm Springs Indian Reservation Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 553-3148 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER MICRO ENTERPRISE WARM SPRINGS COMMUNITY ACTION TEAM INDIVIDUAL DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNT
